text:
- `K` confirm and kill the selected sessions—or the current row when none are selected.
- Exact selected count and handles in the confirmation. [...] - Exact-ID batch killing with double-`K` confirmation [...] Assistant: The live smoke now matches the intended interaction: compact one-line rows, inline fuzzy filtering, Space toggles checkboxes, Enter summarizes the selection, and the kill confirmation defaults to No. I also verified cancellation leaves the terminal in normal mode and performed no kill. I’m at the full repository gates now.
